features.name: module import statement with wildcard
features.description: Code should include an import statement with wildcard import (import pkgname::*;) inside a module body

features.name: scoped type reference with :: scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a type reference using :: scope resolution operator to access a typedef from an imported package

features.name: package with enum typedef
features.description: Code should include a package containing an enum typedef definition
